title: UserComment
description: A comment from a user reviewing the app.

text.description: The text content of the review.

starRating.description: The star rating (1-5) given by the user.

reviewerLanguage.description: BCP-47 language tag of the reviewer's language.

device.description: Information about the device used to write the review.

androidOsVersion.description: The Android OS version of the user's device.

appVersionCode.description: The version code of the app installed when the review was written.

appVersionName.description: The version name of the app installed when the review was written.

thumbsUpCount.description: Number of users who found this review helpful.

thumbsDownCount.description: Number of users who found this review unhelpful.

originalText.description: The untranslated text of the review, if a translation was requested.
